_note_for_player: The Identity Center instance shows Region=eu-west-1 in the console, but the underlying control plane that serves federated logins lives in us-east-1. This is a documented behavior: 'AWS IAM Identity Center is hosted in a single Region, but you can use it to manage access to AWS accounts in any commercial Region.' The 'single Region' is us-east-1 unless explicitly delegated. Federated console logins call into this control plane and fail when it is unreachable.
_observed_during_outage: Federated logins from corporate IdP returning 502 at the SSO redirect endpoint. Existing console sessions with valid credentials continue working until session expiry.
